title: Competency Inventory and Independent Evidence Ledger · Career Evidence Case: Transfer Story
summary: A candidate lists technologies and course completions, yet cannot show the behavior, changed case, personal contribution, limitation, or current reproducibility behind any claim. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the transfer story increment in competency-to-evidence ledger. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and…
objectives: Connect one demonstrated behavior to a changed role context without claiming unobserved expertise.
Distinguish personal decisions and work from collaboration, templates, tutorials, automation, generative assistance, and reviewer input.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Transfer Story · Theory Transfer Story
steps.instruction:
theory case — A course-rich skills list cannot identify one independently reproduced behavior, changed case, personal contribution, current artifact, or honest limitation. The theory variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Connect one demonstrated behavior to a changed role context without claiming unobserved expertise.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Transfer Story contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Transfer Story · Theory Transfer Story.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for connect one demonstrated behavior to a changed role context without claiming unobserved expertise. For Predict Transfer Story · Theory Transfer Story, keep Transfer Story connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Transfer Story condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: ACM Code of Ethics and Professional Conduct — Controls honesty about contribution and competence, privacy, confidentiality, fairness, harm avoidance, professional review, and accountability throughout a search.

options.text: Using the same tool name makes two work contexts equivalent. That claim fails the evidence boundary for Transfer Story.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, changed candidate, rejected failure, causal repair, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer limit; then calibrate the application or career decision to that exact evidence.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A course-rich skills list cannot identify one independently reproduced behavior, changed case, personal contribution, current artifact, or honest limitation. The worked example variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Connect one demonstrated behavior to a changed role context without claiming unobserved expertise. A defensible solution applies Transfer Story, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to competency-to-evidence ledger.

content.code:
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-3
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Using the same tool name makes two work contexts equivalent. This fails the Transfer Story contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: ACM Code of Ethics and Professional Conduct (ACM Code 2018 current) — Controls honesty about contribution and competence, privacy, confidentiality, fairness, harm avoidance, professional review, and accountability throughout a search.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Connect one demonstrated behavior to a changed role context without claiming unobserved expertise.
